description.content:
A best-effort OpenAPI 3.1 description of selected endpoints from the Apache
Solr HTTP API, including the Collections (Cluster/Node Management), Schema,
and v2 cluster APIs. Solr's full APIs are exposed as v1 (action-style query
parameters under `/solr/admin/*`) and v2 (resource-style paths under
`/api/*`). Authentication is optional but BasicAuth is supported when the
Solr `BasicAuthPlugin` is enabled.


Contact Support:
 Name: Apache Solr
